title: Senior Mechanical Technician
description:
Senior Mechanical Technician

Our client is a MNC chemical manufacturer company. They are currently seeking for Senior Mechanical Technician.

The role of the Senior Mechanical Technician includes:

  • Manage emergency/ unscheduled repairs of production equipment. Provide redesign and improvements to equipment Subject Matter Expert (SME) on Root Cause Failure Analysis (RCFA) and ensure action follow-up to prevent recurrence of breakdowns.
  • Lead repairs, improvement project implementation and liaise with vendors / contractors on scope of work.
  • Lead Root Cause Analyses (RCA), conduct investigation, create solutions and take full ownership of the report, including coordinating/ follow-up investigation with team member.
  • Lead spare parts Management and annual inventory stock-count.
  • Compile and monitor Equipment Reliability Action Tasks execution and completion then analyze and optimize.
  • Any other duties and responsibilities as assigned by the Maintenance Manager from time to time.


Job Requirement:

  • Diploma/ Degree in mechanical Engineering or any relevant trade certificate.
  • Minimum 05 years of experience in a process plant with maintenance experience.
  • Should be able to communicate in English written & spoken.
  • Knowledge of mechanical / process systems.
  • Able to work independently as well as in a team with strong troubleshooting skill.

Interested candidates, please send your detailed resume stating Past Employments, including Reasons of Leaving, Last Drawn Salary for the most recent 2 positions (breakdown of basic salary, allowance, bonuses etc), Expected Basic Salary and availability.

WE REGRET TO INFORM THAT ONLY SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES WILL BE NOTIFIED

Manfield Employment Services Pte Ltd (Lic. No: 95C2823)
Posting Personnel: Win Hui
EA Personnel Reg No.: R23115634

Kindly send in your latest job resume without your NRIC numbers and other ID numbers.
For job resume(s) that contain NRIC numbers and/ or ID details, it may not be processed and your job application may be rejected due to improper submission of job application details. Please refer to the advisory guidelines on the PDPA for NRIC numbers and other ID numbers.

By sending your job resume to us, it shall be deemed that you have agreed and hereby give your consent to MANFIELD in collecting, using and/ or disclosing your personal data for the purpose of accessing and processing your job application and/ or for future job opportunities within MANFIELD and/ or with the client(s) of MANFIELD. If you wish to withdraw your consent, please notify us. Kindly visit our company website for more information on the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
Manfield is a professional Headhunting, Recruitment and Consultancy Company first established in Singapore since 1995, we have also expanded our presence to Mainland China since 2005.

Our consultants in Manfield possess in-depth knowledge and expertise of industries that they specialise in.

With more than 100,000 unique profiles in our database, our dedicated team is constantly to source, interview and shortlist the ideal people for organisations, and have the passion to deliver effective human capital solutions. We are passionate to serve to our best capacity. We uphold professional values and instill confidence in our clients, including establishing long term business relationships with them.
